sections.title: Admission of foreign students
sections.content:
Kuban State University welcomes students from all over the world.

ADMISSION PROCEDURE:
1. Submit documents through the university portal (https://cabinet.rt.asurso.ru)
2. Receive an invitation letter
3. Prepare documents for a visa
4. Register with the MFC or the Ministry of Internal Affairs

USEFUL INFORMATION:
- Academic year: September - May
- Dormitory: available for international students
- Scholarship: available for excellent students
- Medical insurance: required

sections.title: Dormitory and accommodation
sections.content:
CONDITIONS OF RESIDENCE IN THE HOSTEL:

Rooms: 2-3 people per room
Conditions: Bed, wardrobe, desk, chair
Utilities: Included in price
Curfew: 23:00-6:00 (weekends: 24:00-8:00)

COST:
- Standard room: ~200-300 rubles/month
- Dormitory near campus: 15 minutes by bus

CONTACT:
Dormitory administration: +7-918-XXXXXXXX
email: dormitory@kubsu.ru

sections.title: Academic information
sections.content:
COURSE STRUCTURE:
- Bachelor's degree: 4 years
- Master's degree: 2 years
- Postgraduate studies: 3 years

LANGUAGE OF TRAINING: Russian
REQUIREMENTS: TRK B1 for bachelor's degree, B2 for master's degree

EXAMINATIONS AND ASSESSMENTS:
- Examination session: May-June
- Rating scale: 5 (excellent), 4 (good), 3 (satisfactory)
- Minimum score to pass: 3

sections.title: Location and contact information of KubSU
sections.content:
KUBAN STATE UNIVERSITY

📍 MAIN CAMPUS:
City: Krasnodar
Region: Krasnodar region, Russia
Address: st. Stavropolskaya, 149, Krasnodar, 350040
Phone: +7-861-219-91-01
Email: info@kubsu.ru
Website: https://kubsu.ru

📍 BRANCHES:
- Armavir (Branch of KubSU in Armavir)
- Gelendzhik (Black Sea coast)
- Sochi (Branch of KubSU in Sochi)

🚀 HOW TO GET THERE:
Krasnodar Airport: 25 km from the main campus
Travel time: 30-40 minutes by taxi
Public transport: buses 1, 15, 23, 43
Train station: 5 km from campus

⏰ OPENING TIME:
- Monday-Friday: 08:00-20:00
- Saturday: 09:00-15:00
- Sunday: Closed

📞 CONTACTS FOR FOREIGNERS:
International Cooperation Department: +7-861-XXX-XXXX
Email of international students: international@kubsu.ru
Reception office: Main building, 3rd floor
